fa-user-plus.appearanceId: person silhouette with plus sign overlay to the right
fa-user-plus.functionalityId: add a new user or contact
fa-user-plus.intentId: invite or register a new person

fa-users.appearanceId: two person silhouettes side by side
fa-users.functionalityId: view or manage a group of users
fa-users.intentId: access team members or community list

fa-utensils-slash.appearanceId: fork and knife crossed with a diagonal slash line through them
fa-utensils-slash.functionalityId: indicate no food or dining unavailable
fa-utensils-slash.intentId: mark a location as closed or food-free

fa-v.functionalityId: label or select a V-keyed item
fa-v.intentId: identify a V-designated option or shortcut

fa-video.appearanceId: rectangle camera body with triangular lens pointing right
fa-video.functionalityId: start or access a video stream
fa-video.intentId: launch or view a video call or recording

fa-video-arrow-down-left.appearanceId: rectangle video camera body with an arrow pointing down and to the left
fa-video-arrow-down-left.functionalityId: download or receive an incoming video
fa-video-arrow-down-left.intentId: save or accept a video to local storage

fa-video-arrow-up-right.appearanceId: rectangle video camera body with an arrow pointing up and to the right
fa-video-arrow-up-right.functionalityId: upload or send an outgoing video
fa-video-arrow-up-right.intentId: share or publish a video to a remote destination

fa-video-slash.appearanceId: video camera shape with diagonal slash line through it
fa-video-slash.intentId: turn off camera during a call or session

fa-volcano.appearanceId: mountain peak with eruption plume rising from the summit
fa-volcano.functionalityId: indicate volcanic activity or geological hazard
fa-volcano.intentId: mark or warn about an eruption or natural disaster

fa-volleyball.appearanceId: spherical ball with curved panel seam lines
fa-volleyball.functionalityId: browse volleyball sport or activity content
fa-volleyball.intentId: access volleyball game or team information

fa-volume-low.appearanceId: speaker cone with a single small sound arc
fa-volume-low.functionalityId: set or indicate low volume level
fa-volume-low.intentId: reduce audio output to a quiet level

fa-w.functionalityId: label or select a W-keyed item
fa-w.intentId: identify a W-designated option or shortcut

fa-warehouse.appearanceId: wide low building with arched front loading facade
fa-warehouse.functionalityId: access warehouse or storage facility info
fa-warehouse.intentId: manage or navigate to an inventory storage location

fa-warehouse-alt.appearanceId: wide low building with a flat front facade and door opening
fa-warehouse-alt.functionalityId: access alternate warehouse or storage location
fa-warehouse-alt.intentId: manage a secondary storage or fulfillment facility

fa-watch-apple.appearanceId: rounded square smartwatch face on a strap with an apple logo
fa-watch-apple.functionalityId: connect or manage an Apple Watch device
fa-watch-apple.intentId: pair or view Apple Watch health and notification data

fa-whale.appearanceId: side-view whale with tail fin and water spout
fa-whale.functionalityId: browse ocean wildlife or marine content

fa-wheat.appearanceId: wheat stalk with grain head and leaves
fa-wheat.intentId: indicate a wheat ingredient or agricultural item

fa-wheat-alt.appearanceId: wheat stalk with alternate grain head arrangement and leaves
fa-wheat-alt.functionalityId: browse alternate wheat or grain content
fa-wheat-alt.intentId: indicate a grain variant or crop-related item

fa-wheat-awn-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: wheat awn stalk with a circle containing an exclamation mark badge
fa-wheat-awn-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: warn about wheat allergen or grain issue
fa-wheat-awn-circle-exclamation.intentId: alert user to a gluten or wheat-related caution

fa-wheat-awn-slash.appearanceId: wheat awn stalk with a diagonal slash line through it
fa-wheat-awn-slash.functionalityId: indicate gluten-free or no wheat content
fa-wheat-awn-slash.intentId: filter out or exclude wheat or gluten items

fa-wheat-slash.appearanceId: wheat stalk with grain head crossed by a diagonal slash line
fa-wheat-slash.functionalityId: indicate no wheat or gluten-free option
fa-wheat-slash.intentId: exclude wheat allergen from a selection or menu

fa-wheelchair.appearanceId: person seated in wheelchair side view
fa-wheelchair.functionalityId: indicate wheelchair accessibility or disability info
fa-wheelchair.intentId: access or filter for accessible facilities or services

fa-wifi.appearanceId: three concentric arcs with dot at base, signal broadcast shape
fa-wifi.functionalityId: connect to or manage a wireless network
fa-wifi.intentId: join or check a WiFi or wireless connection

fa-wifi-1.appearanceId: three wifi arcs with only the smallest arc filled
fa-wifi-1.intentId: show minimal or nearly absent WiFi connectivity

fa-wifi-2.appearanceId: three wifi arcs with two arcs filled

fa-wind.appearanceId: three wavy horizontal lines suggesting airflow
fa-wind.functionalityId: display wind speed or air movement data
fa-wind.intentId: check current wind conditions or forecast

fa-wind-turbine.appearanceId: vertical pole with three-bladed rotor at the top
fa-wind-turbine.functionalityId: browse wind energy or turbine information
fa-wind-turbine.intentId: access renewable wind power or energy stats

fa-wind-warning.appearanceId: three wavy wind lines with a triangle exclamation warning badge
fa-wind-warning.functionalityId: alert user to dangerous wind conditions
fa-wind-warning.intentId: warn about high wind or storm wind hazard

fa-wine-bottle.appearanceId: tall narrow wine bottle with label
fa-wine-bottle.functionalityId: browse wine selection or bottle inventory
fa-wine-bottle.intentId: choose or view a specific wine bottle option

fa-wine-glass.functionalityId: browse wine or beverage menu options
fa-wine-glass.intentId: select a wine or fine dining drink item

fa-wine-glass-alt.appearanceId: tall stemmed wine glass with wider bowl and narrower stem
fa-wine-glass-alt.functionalityId: browse alternate wine glass or beverage options
fa-wine-glass-alt.intentId: select a different style of wine or drink vessel

fa-worm.intentId: identify or select a worm or soil organism item

fa-wrench.appearanceId: wrench with open-end head and handle
